permalink: /puzzles/noodles-1/
---

# Noodles

Draw lines through all unshaded cells.

Lines cannot cross or branch off and cannot form loops.

Each line must form exactly one 2x2 region.

A number indicates how many noodle endpoints are in the 4 orthogonally adjacent cells.

One example puzzle with its solution (click to solve on Penpa+):
[![Example 1](../../images/puzzles/2025/exampleNoodles1.png)](https://swaroopg92.github.io/penpa-edit/#m=solve&&a=RZBBCsVACEPv0nU2X40eZuj9r9H0Z4ZCwUdMYpm1bqwrElH4XXgp01TIrRFJUyPmUPafMk5CVGFSwlsJtFYJ2lcE3VeNcp+IOzGgNdnbCRba/6JgOyt7O9FxfKLxNdm3T8J4qzFu0Zi9JcYtGvPe1Xt83/0A)
[Solution to example](../../images/puzzles/2025/exampleNoodles1SOLUTION.png)


Click the images to solve on Penpa+.
[![Click to solve on Penpa+](../../images/puzzles/2025/noodles1.png)](https://swaroopg92.github.io/penpa-edit/#m=solve&&a=RY/RCcQwDEN3ybd+zo7lYUL3X6MiMj0o6OFnq+ScB2dFIjZ+C0uRQ4UsUyP7UgZ2mLRnm/wssXlJSztNiRqqzxbKt1Llvyk4VOBYotwsom81oGcM0M2KHlKLb7XevpBqNyvaVnGt3v7/nhc=)
